info.name: Free Crypto News API
info.description:
🆓 100% FREE crypto news API — real-time aggregator for Bitcoin, Ethereum, DeFi, Solana & altcoins.

No API key required for public endpoints.

Aggregates news from 75+ sources across 18 languages.

Base URL: https://cryptocurrency.cv/api

GitHub: https://github.com/nirholas/free-crypto-news

variable.description: Optional API key for authenticated endpoints

item.name: News
item.description: Core news endpoints — fetch, search, filter, and discover crypto news from 75+ sources.

request.description: Get the latest crypto news aggregated from all sources

query.description: Language code (en, es, fr, de, ja, ko, zh, etc.)

request.description: Get international crypto news from 75+ sources across 18 languages
Extract full article content from a URL
Search news by keywords across all sources
Get Bitcoin-specific news (BTC, Lightning Network, miners)
Get DeFi-specific news (yield farming, DEXs, lending, protocols)
Get breaking news from the last 2 hours
Get trending crypto topics with sentiment analysis
Get articles for a specific tag
Get list of all news sources with status

item.name: Markets
item.description: Market data endpoints — prices, coins, exchanges, Fear & Greed index, OHLC, and more.

request.description: Get top cryptocurrencies by market cap
Get OHLC candlestick data for a coin
Get historical market data for a coin on a specific date
Get comprehensive market snapshot for a coin
Search for coins by name or symbol
Compare multiple cryptocurrencies side by side
Get current prices for specified coins
Get the Crypto Fear & Greed Index
Get global crypto market data (total market cap, volume, dominance)
Get DeFi market overview from CoinGecko

item.name: DeFi
item.description: DeFi endpoints — yields, stablecoins, DEX volumes, bridges, TVL, and protocol health.

request.description: Get yields specifically for stablecoin pools
Get yield statistics and median data
Get DeFi market summary with TVL and trends
Get DEX trading volumes across chains
Get cross-chain bridge volumes and TVL

item.name: Blockchain
item.description: On-chain data — Bitcoin mempool, exchange flows, gas prices, NFTs, L2 metrics, and protocol analytics.

request.description: Get on-chain metrics for a cryptocurrency
Get list of L2 projects with TVL

item.name: Social
item.description: Social intelligence — sentiment, influencers, trending topics, and social feeds.

request.description: Get trending narratives across social media
Get social metrics for all coins
Get DAO governance proposals and updates

item.name: Trading
item.description: Trading endpoints — signals, arbitrage, funding rates, liquidations, whale alerts, and orderbook.

request.description: Convert between crypto and fiat currencies

item.name: Tools
item.description: AI-powered tools — sentiment analysis, summarization, Q&A, fact-checking, content detection, and more.

request.description: Unified AI endpoint. Actions: summarize, sentiment, facts, factcheck, questions, categorize, translate
Get AI-powered sentiment analysis for a crypto asset
AI-summarize a specific article by URL

query.value: What is happening with Bitcoin ETFs?

request.description: Ask a natural language question about crypto news
Get an AI-generated daily crypto news brief
Generate a bull vs bear debate on a crypto topic
Generate counter-arguments for any crypto claim
Detect whether content was generated by AI
Extract named entities from crypto news
Ask the AI oracle any crypto question
Generate a deep-dive AI research report
Get latest crypto regulatory news and updates
Get macroeconomic data relevant to crypto

item.name: Feeds
item.description: RSS, Atom, OPML feeds, data export, webhooks, and utility endpoints.

request.description: Download OPML file with all sources for RSS readers
Check API health and RSS feed status
Get API analytics: articles per source, hourly distribution
Register a webhook for news notifications
